creator: sothat@alleyoop.m8.ntu.edu.tw
text:
The editor/AbiWord port fails to compile because the include file 
"wv.h" is installed into /usr/local/include previously by textproc/mswordview port, while wv.h is totally different.

Fix: 

Workaround:
Remove /usr/local/include/wv.h temporarily or deinstall mswordview
How-To-Repeat: 
install ports/textproc/mswordview than install AbiWord
